title: Geolosys Next
description: Geolosys fork for 1.20.1 with extra changes
body:
This is an attempt to port Geolosys to 1.20.1. Something may be broken. So testing is welcomed!
Questions/issues go directly into the [github issues](https://github.com/immails/Geolosys-Next/issues)

### Overview

Geolosys is a mod-compatibility-first Ore Generation overhaul mod that integrates Geological Systems into Minecraft. Geolosys is highly configurable via Datapacks and comes with a pre-defined set of default resources to work with a large majority of tech mods!
Learning More

For starters, the in-game field manual can teach players all they'll need to know about generation, Pluton types, resources and more. On top of that, the [wiki](https://mods.oitsjustjose.com/Geolosys) is full of even more information for mod developers

###### [Original Geolosys is here](https://modrinth.com/mod/geolosys)
